items.name_en: 💖【Complete Original Packaging】💖【New Arrival】Best-selling vintage-style underarm bag, made of new soft fat sheepskin, soft and premium leather. This Aventure leather bag is inspired by the 2009 M-series classic design, restructured to reinterpret the unique shape and refresh its personality. Embossed letter logo adds a signature element, vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, and a long wrist strap for use as a handbag or shoulder bag.

items.name_en: 💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖MIUMIU 24ss Autumn/Winter New Baguette Bag
items.name_cn:
💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖MIUMIU 24ss Autumn/Winter New Baguette Bag
The baguette design leads new trends, full of 'girly sentiment' centered around an intellectual vibe, a free-spirited and chic big sister style showing a casual attitude, revealing the unique charm of a Miu Miu girl. Just the right size, sweet yet spicy or cool and handsome, and the capacity meets daily needs. Good-looking and practical, it's hard not to love it!
Model: 5BD265.
Size: 28x11x15cm.
Color: Brown Full Leather/Original Leather.
Italian Creation

items.name_en: 💖Complete with original retail packaging💖【New】The Padlock series makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 Early Autumn collection, unlocking various carrying styles. This style is suitable for both handbag and crossbody wear, with a webbing lining that pays tribute to the brand's iconic elements.
items.name_cn:
💖Complete with original retail packaging💖【New】The Padlock series makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 Early Autumn collection, unlocking various carrying styles. This style is suitable for both handbag and crossbody wear, with a webbing lining that pays tribute to the brand's iconic elements.
Acid Red GG interlaced pattern coated fabric
Acid Red leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Acid Red cotton lining
Interior: One open pocket
Exterior: One open pocket
Handle (6cm high)
Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap (Height: 57cm – 62cm; Length: 103cm – 123cm)
Padlock clasp with leather key charm
Model: 838999.
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 13cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.6kg
Color: Acid Red/Embossed.
Made in Italy

This saddle long wallet is understated yet elegant. Crafted with black hand-stitched inlaid grain cowhide and beige and black Oblique printed fabric, it reinterprets the classic saddle silhouette, featuring a metal-plated copper alloy Dior logo on the front for a touch of class. items.name_en: Caramel Calfskin with Canvas
items.name_cn:
Caramel Calfskin with Canvas
Extraordinary lightweight texture, named for the exquisite Y logo inspired by the fashion house's archival designs.
Elegant and structured, the handle features a hollow-out design and comes with an adjustable detachable shoulder strap for various carrying options.
Gives a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Unisex, suitable as a briefcase or travel tote, with extra-large capacity.
Model: 800224
Dimensions: 23×29.5×3-8.5cm
Handle Height: 7cm
Shoulder Strap Length: 48cm
